articles.title: $BTC: Decreasing ‘Stablecoin Circulation’ Despite Increase in Bitcoin Price Could Suggest Upcoming Breakout
articles.description: The decreasing supply of stablecoins circulating could suggest that the flagship cryptocurrency Bitcoin ($BTC) is set to breakout upwards in the near future, based on historical data. That’s according to cryptocurrency analytics firm Santiment, which noted in a new report that the circulating supply of leading stablecoins Tether ($USDT) and $USDC has been decreasing since […]

articles.title: Can GameFi Still Unlock the Metaverse?
articles.description: GameFi is the integration of gaming and finance and is often framed as an essential stepping stone to the metaverse. We sat down with Blockworks reporter Ornella Hernandez to ask if current market conditions have changed this thesis.

articles.title: Alchemy expands its infrastructure into Polkadot ecosystem via deal with Astar
articles.description: The partnership will help fulfill the scaling need of dApps on Astar, a parachain that operates a smart contract platform on Polkadot.

articles.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Inch Higher, APE and SNX Rally
articles.description: Bitcoin price started a fresh increase above the USD 23,200 resistance zone and is currently (11:20 UTC) trading near USD 23,400. BTC is up 2% in a day and 10% in a week. Similarly, most major altcoins are also moving higher. ETH climbed above the USD 1,620 and USD 1,650 resistance levels. XRP might rise towards USD 0.388. ADA is eyeing a break above the USD 0.52 resistance. Total...

articles.title: Solana exploit enters second day as CEO points to attack on Apple hot wallets
articles.description: The Solana Layer 1 blockchain continues to suffer from an exploit targeting its crypto wallets, with more than 7,000 addresses affected.

articles.title: Cardano-based smart contracts surpass the 3,000 mark for the first time
articles.description: The Cardano (ADA) network had a significant update in September 2021, which included the incorporation of smart contract functionality, making... Continue reading The post Cardano-based smart contracts surpass the 3,000 mark for the first time appeared first on Finbold.

articles.title: SOL Drops as Thousands of Wallets Attacked on Solana, Millions in USD Stolen
articles.description: An ongoing Solana (SOL) hack has affected more than 8,000 wallets and drained a (currently) estimated USD 4.5m-USD 8m worth of funds. According to data compiled by crypto tracking platform MistTrack, four addresses linked to hackers have so far stolen USD 580m worth of crypto assets from over 8,000 wallets. However, MistTrack stated that, excluding the value of EXIST "and other...
